# TS9501

**Category:** Comptime · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Compile-time evaluation failed: {error}
```

## Explanation

The comptime() block threw an error during compile-time evaluation.

This could be:
1. A runtime error in the evaluated code
2. An operation not supported in compile-time context
3. A dependency on runtime values

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
